# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "name": "vnet", 
  "type": "Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks", 
  "apiVersion": "2018-11-01", 
  "location": "[resourceGroup().location]", 
  "sku": {
    "tier": "Standard"
  }, 
  
  "resources": [
    {
      "apiVersion": "2019-03-01", 
      "type": "subnets", 
       // Web subnet 
      "name": "subnet-web", 
      "properties": {
        "addressPrefixes": "[parameters('virtualNetworkAddressSpaces').web]" 
      
      }, 
    }, 
    {
      "apiVersion": "2019-03-01", 
      // App subnet 
      "type": "subnets", 
      "name": "subnet-app", 
      "properties": {
       // Database subnet 
       "addressPrefixes": "[parameters('virtualNetworkAddressSpaces').database]" 
      }
    }, 
    {
      // Database subnet 
     "apiVersion": "2019-03-01", 
     "type": "subnets", 
     "name": "subnet-app",
     "properties": {
        "addressPrefixes": [
           "[parameters('virtualNetworkAddressSpaces').app]"
        ]
     }
    }, 
    {
      // Database subnet 
     "apiVersion": "2019-03-01", 
      "type": "subnets", 
       "name": "subnet-app",
       "properties": {
         "addressPrefixes": [
           "[parameters('virtualNetworkAddressSpaces').app]"
